reasoning: Emotional (60%): The green heart core with warm golden/yellow particle scatter is immediately readable as a heal effect and radiates the bright, warm, charming Hyrule mood. Saturated greens and golds hit the expected palette; the heart silhouette is friendly and iconic for Zelda healing; no dark or grim tones present. Score ~8/10. Technical (40%): 1px hard outline visible on the heart at all zoom levels; heart fill uses a clear 3-tone hard shading (dark green outline → mid green body → lighter green highlight); sparkle particles are single-pixel or small pixel clusters that appear grid-snapped with no anti-aliasing; color count is tightly controlled. Minor note: the scattered particle field is slightly irregular in density at the extremities, but stays within acceptable hand-pixeled variation. Score ~7.5/10. Weighted total: (8×0.6)+(7.5×0.4) = 4.8+3.0 = 7.8 → 8. Passes both emotional warmth and technical pixel-art fidelity criteria.
